![](https://www.irocks.com/storage/media/105308/conversions/cut25-38c-wm-thumb.jpg)

CUT25-38Orthoclase Feldspar (134.10 ct)Benono, Mahasoa East Commune, Betroka Dist., Anosy Region., Tuléar Prov., MadagascarGems and Jewelry, 3.3 x 3.1 x 2.1 cmEx. Rainbow of Africa Collection
$15,000.00

[Payment Plan Available](https://www.irocks.com/order-mineral-specimens#payment-plans)[Order Now](https://www.irocks.com/minerals/specimen/53287/order)

When it comes to gems, some mineral species including feldspar are so rare in gem quality at the size needed to produce a large stone, that seeing one cut in this size and spectacle is really a true delight. Many remain uncut due to factors such as softness, cleavage issues, or simply because they aren't considered “gemmy” enough. Feldspar typically is a solid rock former and rarely forms in gem quality; the famous locality in Madagascar is the exception to the rule, and is the only place known for producing feldspar of such fine quality. Most rough material is actually quite old, from the early 1900s, although some was found later as well! This round gem exhibits intense yellow color, with superb luster and gem clarit. This round gem would make an unusual yet exceptional addition to any collection. Ex. Rainbow of Africa Collection, a very famous suite of African gems broken up at auction in 2015. For more information: [https://intelligentcollector.com/the-rainbow-of-africa-collection/](https://intelligentcollector.com/the-rainbow-of-africa-collection/). This super clean, choice, stone is 134.10 ct, 33.95 x 31.60 x 21.40 mm.

Aug 21, 2025\\
\\
**Award-Winning Brilliance: IKONS Receives National Recognition for Design Excellence**\\
\\
We’re excited to announce that IKONS of the Mineral World: Nature's Finest Art has received two national publishing awards, highlighting its visual artistry and design quality.Produced by The Mineralogical Record and designed for collectors, connoisseurs, and art lovers, Ikons is a visually stunning celebration of nature’s finest art: minerals. This impressive book showcases some of the best mineral specimens ever photographed. It raises mineral collecting to the level of fine art with its careful layout, rich imagery, and thoughtful typography- and these awards show it has achieved that.\\
\\
\\
**Read More**](https://www.irocks.com/award-winning-brilliance-ikons-receives-national-recognition-for-design-excellence) [![](https://www.irocks.com/cms/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/gold25-3205c-wm-large-190x250.jpg)\\

We’re excited to announce that IKONS of the Mineral World: Nature's Finest Art has received two national publishing awards, highlighting its visual artistry and design quality.Produced by The Mineralogical Record and designed for collectors, connoisseurs, and art lovers, Ikons is a visually stunning celebration of nature’s finest art: minerals. This impressive book showcases some of the best mineral specimens ever photographed. It raises mineral collecting to the level of fine art with its careful layout, rich imagery, and thoughtful typography- and these awards show it has achieved that.\\
\\
\\
**Read More**](https://www.irocks.com/award-winning-brilliance-ikons-receives-national-recognition-for-design-excellence) [![](https://www.irocks.com/cms/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/gold25-3205c-wm-large-190x250.jpg)\\
\\
Jul 3, 2025\\
\\
**June 2025 Rock Roundup**\\
\\
Welcome to this month's Rock Roundup! Here, we showcase some of the most exciting and favorite specimens recently available for sale. If you missed it, don't worry—we've got a quick recap of the top picks you won't want to miss. This edition features remarkable highlights from the Fine Diamond Update, the Rare Mineral Species Update, and the Eagle's Nest Mine Update.\\
\\
\\
**Read More**](https://www.irocks.com/june-2025-rock-roundup)

metadata.tumblr:description: Orthoclase Feldspar (134.10 ct), Benono, Mahasoa East Commune, Betroka Dist., Anosy Region., Tuléar Prov., Madagascar, gems-and-jewelry, 3.3 x 3.1 x 2.1 cm, When it comes to gems, some mineral species including feldspar are so rare in gem quality at the size needed to produce a large stone, that seeing one cut in this size and spectacle is really a true delight. Many remain uncut due to factors such as softness, cleavage issues, or simply because they aren't considered “gemmy” enough. Feldspar typically is a solid rock former and rarely forms in gem quality; the famous locality in Madagascar is the exception to the rule, and is the only place known for producing feldspar of such fine quality. Most rough material is actually quite old, from the early 1900s, although some was found later as well! This round gem exhibits intense yellow color, with superb luster and gem clarit. This round gem would make an unusual yet exceptional addition to any collection. Ex. Rainbow of Africa Collection, a very famous suite of African gems broken up at auction in 2015. For more information: https://intelligentcollector.com/the-rainbow-of-africa-collection/. This super clean, choice, stone is 134.10 ct, 33.95 x 31.60 x 21.40 mm.
